examples: The Kashi River canal headwork was built on the basis of the Lingong canal.
This was accomplished by separating the project into two main parts; the headwork and the irrigation system.
Having been in service for 123 years, the Lingong canal was replaced in 1967 by this canal headwork in front of us.
